title: rosa lanceolata var. heterotricha
intro: Rosa lanceolata var. heterotricha, also known as the Rosa heterotricha or Chinese rose, is a plant species within the family Rosaceae, native to China. This plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Rosa lanceolata var. heterotricha include reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating various skin conditions. The plant can be prepared into various herbal preparations, such as infusions, decoctions, and salves, to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
